title: lepechinia conferta
intro: Lepechinia conferta, also known as Mexican tea or bee balm, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepechinia conferta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Lepechinia conferta can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
